active_planning_focus: Measure resolved internal-dashboard benchmark artifact readiness
last_planning_summary: User answers for OQ-001 through OQ-004 were applied as benchmark planning-meeting artifact readiness, not dashboard product readiness. The workspace now records resolved OQs, explicit scope boundaries, acceptance criteria, privacy constraints, and non-execution limits before measuring readiness with ni status.

recent_decisions.title: Treat the dashboard request as planning evidence, not build scope.
Use the benchmark workspace only for ni CLI readiness proof.
Scope readiness to the benchmark planning artifact.
Keep approval role explicit even when the named person is unassigned.

recent_risks.title: A downstream actor could treat benchmark artifact answers as dashboard implementation requirements.
Sensitive data could be copied into the benchmark packet or evidence files.
Meeting-readiness ranking could hide acceptance-critical gaps.
The resolved benchmark case could be falsely presented as product-readiness evidence.

notes.planning_aid_only: Session state is a planning aid, not authority.
notes.locked_docs: Session state must not override locked docs.
notes.completion: Session state must not mark docs complete.
notes.raw_transcript: Raw transcript is not the source of truth.
